verses.text: Tua ciangin maang adang khat ka mu leuleu hi. Sumngo mual nih kikal panin sakolleeng li hong paikhia ka mu hi
A leeng masa pen sakol san in kai a, a nihna, sakol vom in kai a
a thumna, sakol kang in kai a, a lina, sakol gial in kai hi
Tua ciangin vantung mi kiangah, “Sia aw, hih sakolleengte bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi
Tua ciangin amah in hong dawng a, “Hihte pen huihleeng li a cihnopna hi a, leitung khempeuhte' Topa' kiang panin a hong paikhia ahi uh hi,” hong ci hi
Sakol vomte in a kaih leeng pen leilu lam Babylon-ah a pai ding hi a, sakol kangte, nitumna lam, sakol gialte, leitaw lam, sakol sante, nisuahna lam gamah a pai ding ahi hi
Tua sakolte, paikhia-in leitung teng a et ding uh ngaklah mahmah uh hi. Tua ahih manin vantung mi in, “Pai un la, leitungteng va en un,” ci-in thu a pia hi. Amaute zong pai-in va en uh hi
Tua ciangin vantung mi in kei hong otsan a, “Leilu lam Babylon gamah a paite in Topa' hehna damsak hi,” hong ci hi.
Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen hi
Amah in, “Babylon gam salsuahna pan a hong ciahkik Heldai, Tobijah, leh Jedaiah-te' hong piak leengte la in la, tua na lak ni mahin Zefaniah' tapa Josiah' inn-ah paipih in
Amaute' hong piak ngun leh khamte zangin kumpi lukhu khat bawl in la, Jehozadak' tapa, siampi lianpen a sem Joshua khusak in
Ama kiangah, ‘Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Hih mipa pen sing bangin A Sel a kici mipa ahi hi. A omna peuhpeuhah amah cithei ding a, Topa' biakinn lamkik ding hi

Amah pen Topa' biakinn a lam dingpa hi a, kumpite' ngah theih minliatna ngahin, ama mite uk ding hi. Ama kumpi tokhom gei-ah siampi khat om ding a, kithutuakin, kilemin na semkhawm ding uh hi,” ci hi,’ va ci in
Tua kumpi lukhu pen Heldai, Tobijah, Jedaiah, leh Josiah-te pahtawi-in phawkna dingin biakinn sungah om ding hi,” hong ci hi

Gamlapi-a a teng mite hong pai-in Topa' innlam nasep hong huh ding uh hi. Tua biakinn a kilamkik ciangin Vanglian Topa in note kiangah kei a hong sawl ahihna thu na thei ding uh hi. Topa na Pasian uh' thupiaknate cingtakin na zuih nak uh leh tu-a ka gen bangin a hong piang ding ahi hi.
